name_policy: Personal names remain in original English.
spoiler_policy: Only information available through each current paragraph is used.

blocks.original_text: The straw on the floor stank of urine. There was no window, no bed, not even a slop bucket. He remembered walls of pale red stone festooned with patches of nitre, a grey door of splintered wood, four inches thick and studded with iron. He had seen them, briefly, a quick glimpse as they shoved him inside. Once the door had slammed shut, he had seen no more. The dark was absolute. He had as well been blind.
blocks.explanation_zh: black cell无window、bed或bucket，urine straw与绝对黑暗剥夺Eddard视觉和尊严。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 绝对dark不仅是环境，也是information deprivation；Eddard连time、body condition与他人命运都不能验证。
blocks.background_zh: **black cells：** Red Keep最深层地牢，无光且高度隔离，专用于让prisoner失去时间感与心理稳定。

blocks.original_text: Or dead. Buried with his king. “Ah, Robert,” he murmured as his groping hand touched a cold stone wall, his leg throbbing with every motion. He remembered the jest the king had shared in the crypts of Winterfell, as the Kings of Winter looked on with cold stone eyes. The king eats, Robert had said, and the Hand takes the shit. How he had laughed. Yet he had gotten it wrong. The king dies, Ned Stark thought, and the Hand is buried.
blocks.explanation_zh: 他把自己想成与Robert同葬，改写旧笑话为king dies、Hand is buried。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert旧joke从行政抱怨转为funeral epigram，buried既字面地牢深处也指political death。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: The dungeon was under the Red Keep, deeper than he dared imagine. He remembered the old stories about Maegor the Cruel, who murdered all the masons who labored on his castle, so they might never reveal its secrets.
blocks.explanation_zh: 他想到Maegor杀masons保守Red Keep地下秘密的传说。
blocks.literary_note_zh: black cell剥夺光、时间、食物与消息；Eddard在疼痛、发热和自责中把失败归于自己的blind folly。
blocks.background_zh: **Maegor legend：** 传说Maegor杀建堡workers保守secret passages；Eddard以旧闻放大地下不可逃感。

blocks.original_text: He damned them all: Littlefinger, Janos Slynt and his gold cloaks, the queen, the Kingslayer, Pycelle and Varys and Ser Barristan, even Lord Renly, Robert’s own blood, who had run when he was needed most. Yet in the end he blamed himself. “Fool,” he cried to the darkness, “thrice-damned blind fool.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 他诅咒所有背叛或未援者，最终把最大责任归给自己这个blind fool。
blocks.literary_note_zh: thrice-damned blind fool把责任内化，但名单混合背叛、制度角色和逃走者，实际责任并非只属一人。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: Cersei Lannister’s face seemed to float before him in the darkness. Her hair was full of sunlight, but there was mockery in her smile. “When you play the game of thrones, you win or you die,” she whispered. Ned had played and lost, and his men had paid the price of his folly with their life’s blood.
blocks.explanation_zh: 黑暗中浮现Cersei game-of-thrones警告，Eddard承认自己输且men为其folly流血。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei face是黑暗中memory/hallucination，不是现实出现；game phrase成为失败后的自我判词。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: When he thought of his daughters, he would have wept gladly, but the tears would not come. Even now, he was a Stark of Winterfell, and his grief and his rage froze hard inside him.
blocks.explanation_zh: 想到daughters仍哭不出，Stark式grief与rage在体内冻结。
blocks.literary_note_zh: frozen grief延续Stark/cold意象，也可能是dehydration、shock造成情绪麻木。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: When he kept very still, his leg did not hurt so much, so he did his best to lie unmoving. For how long he could not say. There was no sun and no moon. He could not see to mark the walls. Ned closed his eyes and opened them; it made no difference. He slept and woke and slept again. He did not know which was more painful, the waking or the sleeping. When he slept, he dreamed: dark disturbing dreams of blood and broken promises. When he woke, there was nothing to do but think, and his waking thoughts were worse than nightmares. The thought of Cat was as painful as a bed of nettles. He wondered where she was, what she was doing. He wondered whether he would ever see her again.
blocks.explanation_zh: 不动可减leg pain；无日月使睡醒混乱，血与broken promises梦境、Catelyn思念比nightmare更痛。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 无sensory clock使sleep/dream/waking边界瓦解，后文Harrenhal scenes不能按现实事件读。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: Hours turned to days, or so it seemed. He could feel a dull ache in his shattered leg, an itch beneath the plaster. When he touched his thigh, the flesh was hot to his fingers. The only sound was his breathing. After a time, he began to talk aloud, just to hear a voice. He made plans to keep himself sane, built castles of hope in the dark. Robert’s brothers were out in the world, raising armies at Dragonstone and Storm’s End. Alyn and Harwin would return to King’s Landing with the rest of his household guard once they had dealt with Ser Gregor. Catelyn would raise the north when the word reached her, and the lords of river and mountain and Vale would join her.
blocks.explanation_zh: 时间似变days，leg发热发痒；他为sanity自言自语，幻想Robert brothers、household、Catelyn与各地lords会来救。
blocks.literary_note_zh: castles of hope明确标示这些救援计划是维持sanity的想象，不是收到的情报。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: He found himself thinking of Robert more and more. He saw the king as he had been in the flower of his youth, tall and handsome, his great antlered helm on his head, his warhammer in hand, sitting his horse like a horned god. He heard his laughter in the dark, saw his eyes, blue and clear as mountain lakes. “Look at us, Ned,” Robert said. “Gods, how did we come to this? You here, and me killed by a pig. We won a throne together . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: 他越来越看见年轻Robert持warhammer如horned god，并听梦中Robert追问两人为何落到此境。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 年轻Robert是memory ideal，不是临终真实形象；horned god放大Eddard失去的heroic past。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: I failed you, Robert, Ned thought. He could not say the words. I lied to you, hid the truth. I let them kill you.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard在心里认错：撒谎、隐瞒truth并让Robert被杀。
blocks.literary_note_zh: black cell剥夺光、时间、食物与消息；Eddard在疼痛、发热和自责中把失败归于自己的blind folly。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: The king heard him. “You stiff-necked fool,” he muttered, “too proud to listen. Can you eat pride, Stark? Will honor shield your children?” Cracks ran down his face, fissures opening in the flesh, and he reached up and ripped the mask away. It was not Robert at all; it was Littlefinger, grinning, mocking him. When he opened his mouth to speak, his lies turned to pale grey moths and took wing.
blocks.explanation_zh: 梦中Robert责honor不能护children，脸裂成Littlefinger mask，谎言化grey moths飞走。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert→Littlefinger mask把两种失败解释叠合：pride/honor与deception；moths让lies看似脆弱却已飞散无法追回。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: Ned was half-asleep when the footsteps came down the hall. At first he thought he dreamt them; it had been so long since he had heard anything but the sound of his own voice. Ned was feverish by then, his leg a dull agony, his lips parched and cracked. When the heavy wooden door creaked open, the sudden light was painful to his eyes.
blocks.explanation_zh: 发热半睡时脚步与开门light出现，他起初以为仍在梦。
blocks.literary_note_zh: black cell剥夺光、时间、食物与消息；Eddard在疼痛、发热和自责中把失败归于自己的blind folly。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: A gaoler thrust a jug at him. The clay was cool and beaded with moisture. Ned grasped it with both hands and gulped eagerly. Water ran from his mouth and dripped down through his beard. He drank until he thought he would be sick. “How long . . . ?” he asked weakly when he could drink no more.
blocks.explanation_zh: gaoler给水，Eddard急饮后问被关多久。
blocks.literary_note_zh: black cell剥夺光、时间、食物与消息；Eddard在疼痛、发热和自责中把失败归于自己的blind folly。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: The gaoler was a scarecrow of a man with a rat’s face and frayed beard, clad in a mail shirt and a leather half cape. “No talking,” he said as he wrenched the jug from Ned’s hands.
blocks.explanation_zh: rat-faced gaoler命令不许说话并夺回jug。
blocks.literary_note_zh: black cell剥夺光、时间、食物与消息；Eddard在疼痛、发热和自责中把失败归于自己的blind folly。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “Please,” Ned said, “my daughters . . . ” The door crashed shut. He blinked as the light vanished, lowered his head to his chest, and curled up on the straw. It no longer stank of urine and shit. It no longer smelled at all.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard求问daughters却被关门，随后嗅觉也因适应/衰弱不再感到污臭。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 不再闻臭可能是olfactory adaptation、fever或虚弱；叙述不说明唯一原因。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: He could no longer tell the difference between waking and sleeping. The memory came creeping upon him in the darkness, as vivid as a dream. It was the year of false spring, and he was eighteen again, down from the Eyrie to the tourney at Harrenhal. He could see the deep green of the grass, and smell the pollen on the wind. Warm days and cool nights and the sweet taste of wine. He remembered Brandon’s laughter, and Robert’s berserk valor in the melee, the way he laughed as he unhorsed men left and right. He remembered Jaime Lannister, a golden youth in scaled white armor, kneeling on the grass in front of the king’s pavilion and making his vows to protect and defend King Aerys. Afterward, Ser Oswell Whent helped Jaime to his feet, and the White Bull himself, Lord Commander Ser Gerold Hightower, fastened the snowy cloak of the Kingsguard about his shoulders. All six White Swords were there to welcome their newest brother.
blocks.explanation_zh: 意识混乱中重回false spring Harrenhal：十八岁时见Robert melee、Jaime在Aerys前立Kingsguard vows。
blocks.literary_note_zh: false spring memory由Jaime vows开始，连接当下Kingsguard loyalty崩塌；此处为Eddard意识流。
blocks.background_zh: **Harrenhal tourney：** rebellion前重大tourney；Jaime入Kingsguard、Rhaegar夺冠并授Lyanna queen of beauty。

blocks.original_text: Yet when the jousting began, the day belonged to Rhaegar Targaryen. The crown prince wore the armor he would die in: gleaming black plate with the three-headed dragon of his House wrought in rubies on the breast. A plume of scarlet silk streamed behind him when he rode, and it seemed no lance could touch him. Brandon fell to him, and Bronze Yohn Royce, and even the splendid Ser Arthur Dayne, the Sword of the Morning.
blocks.explanation_zh: joust属于Rhaegar，black ruby armor击败Brandon、Yohn、Arthur。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 意识退回Harrenhal tourney、Rhaegar blue roses与Lyanna promise；现实中饥饿加重，他靠过期hostage信息维持希望。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: Robert had been jesting with Jon and old Lord Hunter as the prince circled the field after unhorsing Ser Barristan in the final tilt to claim the champion’s crown. Ned remembered the moment when all the smiles died, when Prince Rhaegar Targaryen urged his horse past his own wife, the Dornish princess Elia Martell, to lay the queen of beauty’s laurel in Lyanna’s lap. He could see it still: a crown of winter roses, blue as frost.
blocks.explanation_zh: Rhaegar夺冠后越过wife Elia，把blue winter roses授Lyanna，所有笑容消失。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Rhaegar越过Elia公开授Lyanna flowers成为全场social rupture；文本只给动作与反应，不补动机。
blocks.background_zh: **queen of beauty：** tournament champion将花冠授予一名女性；Rhaegar越过wife Elia选择Lyanna造成公开震动。

blocks.original_text: Ned Stark reached out his hand to grasp the flowery crown, but beneath the pale blue petals the thorns lay hidden. He felt them clawing at his skin, sharp and cruel, saw the slow trickle of blood run down his fingers, and woke, trembling, in the dark.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard梦中伸手抓花冠，被hidden thorns刺流血后惊醒。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 真实花冠在dream中长hidden thorns，象征beauty/honor event后来造成blood pain。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: Promise me, Ned, his sister had whispered from her bed of blood. She had loved the scent of winter roses.
blocks.explanation_zh: Lyanna在bed of blood的Promise me与winter rose scent再次出现。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Promise me内容仍未揭示；bed of blood与winter roses仅重复既有线索。
blocks.background_zh: **Lyanna promise：** 她临终曾要求Eddard promise，内容至今未明，blue roses持续与之相连。

blocks.original_text: “Gods save me,” Ned wept. “I am going mad.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard哭求gods救自己，认为正在发疯。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 意识退回Harrenhal tourney、Rhaegar blue roses与Lyanna promise；现实中饥饿加重，他靠过期hostage信息维持希望。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: The gods did not deign to answer.
blocks.explanation_zh: gods没有回应。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 短句gods silence与Eddard先前祈祷形成冷硬断点，也反映cell中无可观察回应。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: Each time the turnkey brought him water, he told himself another day had passed. At first he would beg the man for some word of his daughters and the world beyond his cell. Grunts and kicks were his only replies. Later, when the stomach cramps began, he begged for food instead. It made no matter; he was not fed. Perhaps the Lannisters meant for him to starve to death. “No,” he told himself. If Cersei had wanted him dead, he would have been cut down in the throne room with his men. She wanted him alive. Weak, desperate, yet alive. Catelyn held her brother; she dare not kill him or the Imp’s life would be forfeit as well.
blocks.explanation_zh: 他以每次turnkey送水记一天；无food导致cramps，却推理Cersei要他weak alive，且误以为Catelyn仍持Tyrion作为保险。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他正确推断Cersei要活口，却用过期信息Tyrion hostage支撑；囚禁使reasoning输入失效。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: From outside his cell came the rattle of iron chains. As the door creaked open, Ned put a hand to the damp wall and pushed himself toward the light. The glare of a torch made him squint. “Food,” he croaked.
blocks.explanation_zh: chains响、门开，Eddard撑墙向torch光爬并求food。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys易容送wine，告知Arya逃、Sansa被控、Tyrion已失；他拒绝救人，只愿按自身利益过滤messages。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “Wine,” a voice answered. It was not the rat-faced man; this gaoler was stouter, shorter, though he wore the same leather half cape and spiked steel cap. “Drink, Lord Eddard.” He thrust a wineskin into Ned’s hands.
blocks.explanation_zh: 新gaoler给的却是wine，命Lord Eddard喝。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys易容送wine，告知Arya逃、Sansa被控、Tyrion已失；他拒绝救人，只愿按自身利益过滤messages。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: The voice was strangely familiar, yet it took Ned Stark a moment to place it. “Varys?” he said groggily when it came. He touched the man’s face. “I’m not . . . not dreaming this. You’re here.” The eunuch’s plump cheeks were covered with a dark stubble of beard. Ned felt the coarse hair with his fingers. Varys had transformed himself into a grizzled turnkey, reeking of sweat and sour wine. “How did you . . . what sort of magician are you?”
blocks.explanation_zh: 熟悉voice让他认出Varys；触摸假stubble确认易容，惊问何种magician。
blocks.literary_note_zh: touch face验证易容强调black cell中触觉替代视觉；Varys通过body performance穿过gaol system。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “A thirsty one,” Varys said. “Drink, my lord.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys自称口渴者，催他喝。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys易容送wine，告知Arya逃、Sansa被控、Tyrion已失；他拒绝救人，只愿按自身利益过滤messages。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: Ned’s hands fumbled at the skin. “Is this the same poison they gave Robert?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard怀疑wine是否与Robert所饮同种poison。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys易容送wine，告知Arya逃、Sansa被控、Tyrion已失；他拒绝救人，只愿按自身利益过滤messages。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “You wrong me,” Varys said sadly. “Truly, no one loves a eunuch. Give me the skin.” He drank, a trickle of red leaking from the corner of his plump mouth. “Not the equal of the vintage you offered me the night of the tourney, but no more poisonous than most,” he concluded, wiping his lips. “Here.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys先亲饮证明，称只是普通劣酒。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys亲饮是poison test，但只能证明同一skin此刻不致命，不证明其整体可信。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: Ned tried a swallow. “Dregs.” He felt as though he were about to bring the wine back up.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard尝出dregs，几乎呕吐。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys易容送wine，告知Arya逃、Sansa被控、Tyrion已失；他拒绝救人，只愿按自身利益过滤messages。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “All men must swallow the sour with the sweet. High lords and eunuchs alike. Your hour has come, my lord.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys用swallow sour/sweet双关说Eddard的hour到了。
blocks.literary_note_zh: sour/sweet既说wine也说政治妥协；your hour has come把饮用变成decision ritual。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “My daughters . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard先问daughters。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys易容送wine，告知Arya逃、Sansa被控、Tyrion已失；他拒绝救人，只愿按自身利益过滤messages。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “The younger girl escaped Ser Meryn and fled,” Varys told him. “I have not been able to find her. Nor have the Lannisters. A kindness, there. Our new king loves her not. Your older girl is still betrothed to Joffrey. Cersei keeps her close. She came to court a few days ago to plead that you be spared. A pity you couldn’t have been there, you would have been touched.” He leaned forward intently. “I trust you realize that you are a dead man, Lord Eddard?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys说Arya逃脱且双方都找不到，Joffrey不喜欢她；Sansa仍与Joffrey订婚、被Cersei控制并曾court求情，随后直说Eddard已是dead man。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya找不到对她是kindness，因为Joffrey hostility；但missing child依然处于巨大风险。
blocks.background_zh: **当前children状态：** Arya逃脱且双方未找到；Sansa由Cersei控制并已公开求mercy。

blocks.original_text: “The queen will not kill me,” Ned said. His head swam; the wine was strong, and it had been too long since he’d eaten. “Cat . . . Cat holds her brother . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard仍以Catelyn持Cersei brother推断queen不敢杀他。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys易容送wine，告知Arya逃、Sansa被控、Tyrion已失；他拒绝救人，只愿按自身利益过滤messages。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “The wrong brother,” Varys sighed. “And lost to her, in any case. She let the Imp slip through her fingers. I expect he is dead by now, somewhere in the Mountains of the Moon.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys说抓的是wrong brother且Tyrion已逃，猜他或死在Mountains。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys猜Tyrion dead与读者刚知其已到Tywin camp形成dramatic irony，也显示master of whisperers有information limits。
blocks.background_zh: **Tyrion事实差：** Catelyn已失去Tyrion，但读者知道他活着抵达Tywin camp；Varys对其死亡只是推测。

blocks.original_text: “If that is true, slit my throat and have done with it.” He was dizzy from the wine, tired and heartsick.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard若属实便要求Varys直接割喉结束。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys易容送wine，告知Arya逃、Sansa被控、Tyrion已失；他拒绝救人，只愿按自身利益过滤messages。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “Your blood is the last thing I desire.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys说最不想要Eddard blood。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys易容送wine，告知Arya逃、Sansa被控、Tyrion已失；他拒绝救人，只愿按自身利益过滤messages。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: Ned frowned. “When they slaughtered my guard, you stood beside the queen and watched, and said not a word.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard责问Stark guards被杀时Varys只旁观。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys易容送wine，告知Arya逃、Sansa被控、Tyrion已失；他拒绝救人，只愿按自身利益过滤messages。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “And would again. I seem to recall that I was unarmed, unarmored, and surrounded by Lannister swords.” The eunuch looked at him curiously, tilting his head. “When I was a young boy, before I was cut, I traveled with a troupe of mummers through the Free Cities. They taught me that each man has a role to play, in life as well as mummery. So it is at court. The King’s Justice must be fearsome, the master of coin must be frugal, the Lord Commander of the Kingsguard must be valiant . . . and the master of whisperers must be sly and obsequious and without scruple. A courageous informer would be as useless as a cowardly knight.” He took the wineskin back and drank.
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys说自己无甲无兵被Lannister swords包围；以mummer childhood解释court人人扮role，courageous informer如cowardly knight一样无用。
blocks.literary_note_zh: role theory为Varys non-intervention辩护：他把survival/utility置于heroic solidarity之上。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: Ned studied the eunuch’s face, searching for truth beneath the mummer’s scars and false stubble. He tried some more wine. This time it went down easier. “Can you free me from this pit?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard在假face上找truth，问能否放自己出pit。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys易容送wine，告知Arya逃、Sansa被控、Tyrion已失；他拒绝救人，只愿按自身利益过滤messages。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “I could . . . but will I? No. Questions would be asked, and the answers would lead back to me.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys说能却不会，因为调查会追到自己。
blocks.literary_note_zh: I could but will I?区分能力与意愿；Varys不因能救就承担risk。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: Ned had expected no more. “You are blunt.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard说他很blunt。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys易容送wine，告知Arya逃、Sansa被控、Tyrion已失；他拒绝救人，只愿按自身利益过滤messages。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “A eunuch has no honor, and a spider does not enjoy the luxury of scruples, my lord.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys称eunuch无honor、spider无scruple luxury。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys易容送wine，告知Arya逃、Sansa被控、Tyrion已失；他拒绝救人，只愿按自身利益过滤messages。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “Would you at least consent to carry a message out for me?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard退求至少带message。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys易容送wine，告知Arya逃、Sansa被控、Tyrion已失；他拒绝救人，只愿按自身利益过滤messages。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “That would depend on the message. I will gladly provide you with paper and ink, if you like. And when you have written what you will, I will take the letter and read it, and deliver it or not, as best serves my own ends.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys只承诺提供paper/ink、先阅读，再按自身利益决定是否送。
blocks.literary_note_zh: deliver it or not明确所有communication都受Varys filter，paper不会恢复Eddard agency。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “Your own ends. What ends are those, Lord Varys?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard追问Varys own ends。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys自称追求peace，确认Cersei借Lancel供wine，分析多front威胁并提出confess/recognize Joffrey换take black。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “Peace,” Varys replied without hesitation. “If there was one soul in King’s Landing who was truly desperate to keep Robert Baratheon alive, it was me.” He sighed. “For fifteen years I protected him from his enemies, but I could not protect him from his friends. What strange fit of madness led you to tell the queen that you had learned the truth of Joffrey’s birth?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys毫不犹豫答peace，称十五年保护Robert却防不了friends，并问Eddard为何把paternity truth告诉Cersei。
blocks.literary_note_zh: serve peace是Varys自我声明；其行动是否真最利realm仍需用后续效果检验。
blocks.background_zh: **Varys office：** master of whisperers靠agents、disguise与partial information服务court，公开目标自称realm peace。

blocks.original_text: “The madness of mercy,” Ned admitted.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard承认是mercy的madness。
blocks.literary_note_zh: madness of mercy承认warning Cersei的道德动机与战略后果同时存在。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “Ah,” said Varys. “To be sure. You are an honest and honorable man, Lord Eddard. Ofttimes I forget that. I have met so few of them in my life.” He glanced around the cell. “When I see what honesty and honor have won you, I understand why.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys称赞honesty/honor，却以black cell结果讽刺其回报。
blocks.literary_note_zh: honor讽刺不等于honor毫无价值，而是它在无enforcement、无secrecy时不能自保。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: Ned Stark laid his head back against the damp stone wall and closed his eyes. His leg was throbbing. “The king’s wine . . . did you question Lancel?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard问Varys是否审Lancel与king wine。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys自称追求peace，确认Cersei借Lancel供wine，分析多front威胁并提出confess/recognize Joffrey换take black。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “Oh, indeed. Cersei gave him the wineskins, and told him it was Robert’s favorite vintage.” The eunuch shrugged. “A hunter lives a perilous life. If the boar had not done for Robert, it would have been a fall from a horse, the bite of a wood adder, an arrow gone astray . . . the forest is the abbatoir of the gods. It was not wine that killed the king. It was your mercy.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys确认Cersei给Lancel wineskins并称Robert favorite；但认为任何hunting accident皆可用，真正致死的是Eddard给Cersei准备时间的mercy。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys确认Cersei增强Robert drunkenness，但说boar而非wine直接杀人；causal responsibility被分成setup与proximate cause。
blocks.background_zh: **Robert death chain：** Cersei让Lancel持续提供烈wine；Robert自行猎boar且命others退开，最终由wound/infection死亡。

blocks.original_text: Ned had feared as much. “Gods forgive me.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard说自己早已担心如此，求gods原谅。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys自称追求peace，确认Cersei借Lancel供wine，分析多front威胁并提出confess/recognize Joffrey换take black。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “If there are gods,” Varys said, “I expect they will. The queen would not have waited long in any case. Robert was becoming unruly, and she needed to be rid of him to free her hands to deal with his brothers. They are quite a pair, Stannis and Renly. The iron gauntlet and the silk glove.” He wiped his mouth with the back of his hand. “You have been foolish, my lord. You ought to have heeded Littlefinger when he urged you to support Joffrey’s succession.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys说Cersei迟早会除Robert以应付brothers，又称Stannis iron gauntlet、Renly silk glove，并说Eddard应听Littlefinger支持Joffrey。
blocks.literary_note_zh: iron gauntlet/silk glove用质地比喻Stannis刚硬、Renly柔顺魅力，是Varys characterization而非完整事实。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “How . . . how could you know of that?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard惊问他如何知private proposal。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys自称追求peace，确认Cersei借Lancel供wine，分析多front威胁并提出confess/recognize Joffrey换take black。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: Varys smiled. “I know, that’s all that need concern you. I also know that on the morrow the queen will pay you a visit.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys拒解释来源，又说Cersei明日会来。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys知道Littlefinger private advice证明其network穿透Eddard最机密meeting，来源刻意不交代。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: Slowly Ned raised his eyes. “Why?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard问为什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys自称追求peace，确认Cersei借Lancel供wine，分析多front威胁并提出confess/recognize Joffrey换take black。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “Cersei is frightened of you, my lord . . . but she has other enemies she fears even more. Her beloved Jaime is fighting the river lords even now. Lysa Arryn sits in the Eyrie, ringed in stone and steel, and there is no love lost between her and the queen. In Dorne, the Martells still brood on the murder of Princess Elia and her babes. And now your son marches down the Neck with a northern host at his back.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys列Cersei多重威胁：Jaime战Riverlands、Lysa守Vale、Martells记Elia之仇、Robb率North host南下。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 威胁清单说明Cersei需要Eddard cooperation不是仁慈，而是多front资源不足。
blocks.background_zh: **Cersei strategic fronts：** Riverlands/North、Vale、Dorne resentment与Stannis/Renly claims同时存在。

blocks.original_text: “Robb is only a boy,” Ned said, aghast.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard震惊说Robb只是boy。
blocks.literary_note_zh: only a boy是父亲反应；Varys用with an army说明political power可改变年龄意义。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “A boy with an army,” Varys said. “Yet only a boy, as you say. The king’s brothers are the ones giving Cersei sleepless nights . . . Lord Stannis in particular. His claim is the true one, he is known for his prowess as a battle commander, and he is utterly without mercy. There is no creature on earth half so terrifying as a truly just man. No one knows what Stannis has been doing on Dragonstone, but I will wager you that he’s gathered more swords than seashells. So here is Cersei’s nightmare: while her father and brother spend their power battling Starks and Tullys, Lord Stannis will land, proclaim himself king, and lop off her son’s curly blond head . . . and her own in the bargain, though I truly believe she cares more about the boy.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys说是boy with army；更危险是Robert brothers，尤其legal claim、善战、无mercy的Stannis，Cersei怕Tywin/Jaime耗在Starks时他登陆斩首。
blocks.literary_note_zh: truly just man terrifying指Stannis不会transactional forgiveness；Varys从Cersei perspective描述，不等于公正本身邪恶。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “Stannis Baratheon is Robert’s true heir,” Ned said. “The throne is his by rights. I would welcome his ascent.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard坚持Stannis是true heir，欢迎其登位。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys自称追求peace，确认Cersei借Lancel供wine，分析多front威胁并提出confess/recognize Joffrey换take black。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: Varys tsked. “Cersei will not want to hear that, I promise you. Stannis may win the throne, but only your rotting head will remain to cheer unless you guard that tongue of yours. Sansa begged so sweetly, it would be a shame if you threw it all away. You are being given your life back, if you’ll take it. Cersei is no fool. She knows a tame wolf is of more use than a dead one.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys警告直说会让Eddard只剩rotting head；Sansa已求情，Cersei愿用tame wolf而非dead one，给他活路。
blocks.literary_note_zh: tame wolf比dead one有用：confession可约束Robb、支持Joffrey legitimacy，还保留Eddard谈判价值。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “You want me to serve the woman who murdered my king, butchered my men, and crippled my son?” Ned’s voice was thick with disbelief.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard不信要自己服务杀Robert、屠men、伤Bran的Cersei。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys自称追求peace，确认Cersei借Lancel供wine，分析多front威胁并提出confess/recognize Joffrey换take black。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “I want you to serve the realm,” Varys said. “Tell the queen that you will confess your vile treason, command your son to lay down his sword, and proclaim Joffrey as the true heir. Offer to denounce Stannis and Renly as faithless usurpers. Our green-eyed lioness knows you are a man of honor. If you will give her the peace she needs and the time to deal with Stannis, and pledge to carry her secret to your grave, I believe she will allow you to take the black and live out the rest of your days on the Wall, with your brother and that baseborn son of yours.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys说要他serve realm：confess treason、命Robb放剑、认Joffrey、斥Stannis/Renly，换取take black到Wall与Jon/Benjen团聚。
blocks.literary_note_zh: take black方案同时满足Cersei peace、Watch exile与Eddard life；代价是公开false confession和放弃Stannis truth。
blocks.background_zh: **take the black deal：** confession后放弃titles、family与politics终身赴Wall，可作为execution替代。

blocks.original_text: The thought of Jon filled Ned with a sense of shame, and a sorrow too deep for words. If only he could see the boy again, sit and talk with him . . . pain shot through his broken leg, beneath the filthy grey plaster of his cast. He winced, his fingers opening and closing helplessly. “Is this your own scheme,” he gasped out at Varys, “or are you in league with Littlefinger?”
blocks.explanation_zh: 想到Jon令Eddard深感shame与sorrow；腿痛中他问此scheme是否与Littlefinger合谋。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon触发shame暗示未说出的past责任，但当前仍不能确定具体内容。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: That seemed to amuse the eunuch. “I would sooner wed the Black Goat of Qohor. Littlefinger is the second most devious man in the Seven Kingdoms. Oh, I feed him choice whispers, sufficient so that he thinks I am his . . . just as I allow Cersei to believe I am hers.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys说宁娶Black Goat也不与Littlefinger结盟，自称只喂足够whispers让Littlefinger误以为控制他，Cersei也同样。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys承认主动制造多人‘他属于我’的错觉，information brokerage依赖controlled partial truth。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “And just as you let me believe that you were mine. Tell me, Lord Varys, who do you truly serve?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard指出Varys也曾让自己以为对方属于己方，问真正效忠谁。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard因honor拒绝为自己撒谎；Varys转以Sansa生命和Rhaenys历史迫他重新衡量。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: Varys smiled thinly. “Why, the realm, my good lord, how ever could you doubt that? I swear it by my lost manhood. I serve the realm, and the realm needs peace.” He finished the last swallow of wine, and tossed the empty skin aside. “So what is your answer, Lord Eddard? Give me your word that you’ll tell the queen what she wants to hear when she comes calling.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys以lost manhood发誓serve realm、realm needs peace，要求Eddard承诺对Cersei说她想听的。
blocks.literary_note_zh: lost manhood oath带自嘲且无法提供外部verification；serve realm仍只是claim。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “If I did, my word would be as hollow as an empty suit of armor. My life is not so precious to me as that.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard说这种word会像empty armor一样空洞，生命不值得如此。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard把honor定位为word与meaning一致；他愿死以避免empty performance。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “Pity.” The eunuch stood. “And your daughter’s life, my lord? How precious is that?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys起身说可惜，改问daughter life值多少。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys把decision object从Eddard life换成Sansa life，瞬间改变moral calculus。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: A chill pierced Ned’s heart. “My daughter . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: 寒意刺心，Eddard重复daughter。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard因honor拒绝为自己撒谎；Varys转以Sansa生命和Rhaenys历史迫他重新衡量。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “Surely you did not think I’d forgotten about your sweet innocent, my lord? The queen most certainly has not.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys说Cersei绝未忘记Sansa。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard因honor拒绝为自己撒谎；Varys转以Sansa生命和Rhaenys历史迫他重新衡量。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “No,” Ned pleaded, his voice cracking. “Varys, gods have mercy, do as you like with me, but leave my daughter out of your schemes. Sansa’s no more than a child.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard声音破裂，求任意处置自己但别利用只是child的Sansa。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard因honor拒绝为自己撒谎；Varys转以Sansa生命和Rhaenys历史迫他重新衡量。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。

blocks.original_text: “Rhaenys was a child too. Prince Rhaegar’s daughter. A precious little thing, younger than your girls. She had a small black kitten she called Balerion, did you know? I always wondered what happened to him. Rhaenys liked to pretend he was the true Balerion, the Black Dread of old, but I imagine the Lannisters taught her the difference between a kitten and a dragon quick enough, the day they broke down her door.” Varys gave a long weary sigh, the sigh of a man who carried all the sadness of the world in a sack upon his shoulders. “The High Septon once told me that as we sin, so do we suffer. If that’s true, Lord Eddard, tell me . . . why is it always the innocents who suffer most, when you high lords play your game of thrones? Ponder it, if you would, while you wait upon the queen. And spare a thought for this as well: The next visitor who calls on you could bring you bread and cheese and the milk of the poppy for your pain . . . or he could bring you Sansa’s head.
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys以Rhaenys被害说明high lords游戏总让innocents受苦，最后警告下个visitor可带food、poppy，也可带Sansa head。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Rhaenys例子不是随机恐吓：Eddard亲历capital after sack，知道high politics确会杀children。Sansa head是明确coercive threat。
blocks.background_zh: **Rhaenys：** Rhaegar年幼daughter，在King’s Landing被攻破时遇害；Varys用她说明children并不受noble game保护。

blocks.original_text: “The choice, my dear lord Hand, is entirely yours.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys把选择完全归给Eddard。
blocks.literary_note_zh: entirely yours是假choice语言：Cersei/Varys控制punishment条件，却把责任转嫁给受胁迫者。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在black-cell sensory deprivation、Eddard不可靠意识状态与Varys提出的coercive bargain。
